mapper.insert: INSERT INTO dm_conversation (user1_id, user2_id, user1_deleted, user2_deleted, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{user1Id}, #{user2Id}, false, false, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT c.*, u1.nickname as user1_nickname, p1.profile_image_url as user1_profile_image, u1.is_online as user1_is_online, u2.nickname as user2_nickname, p2.profile_image_url as user2_profile_image, u2.is_online as user2_is_online, lm.content as last_message_content, lm.sender_id as last_message_sender_id FROM dm_conversation c LEFT JOIN user u1 ON c.user1_id = u1.id LEFT JOIN profile p1 ON u1.id = p1.user_id LEFT JOIN user u2 ON c.user2_id = u2.id LEFT JOIN profile p2 ON u2.id = p2.user_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT dm.conversation_id, dm.content, dm.sender_id FROM direct_message dm INNER JOIN ( SELECT conversation_id, MAX(id) as max_id FROM direct_message WHERE is_deleted = false GROUP BY conversation_id ) latest ON dm.id = latest.max_id ) lm ON c.id = lm.conversation_id WHERE c.id = #{id}

SELECT c.*, u1.nickname as user1_nickname, p1.profile_image_url as user1_profile_image, u1.is_online as user1_is_online, u2.nickname as user2_nickname, p2.profile_image_url as user2_profile_image, u2.is_online as user2_is_online, lm.content as last_message_content, lm.sender_id as last_message_sender_id FROM dm_conversation c LEFT JOIN user u1 ON c.user1_id = u1.id LEFT JOIN profile p1 ON u1.id = p1.user_id LEFT JOIN user u2 ON c.user2_id = u2.id LEFT JOIN profile p2 ON u2.id = p2.user_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT dm.conversation_id, dm.content, dm.sender_id FROM direct_message dm INNER JOIN ( SELECT conversation_id, MAX(id) as max_id FROM direct_message WHERE is_deleted = false GROUP BY conversation_id ) latest ON dm.id = latest.max_id ) lm ON c.id = lm.conversation_id WHERE (c.user1_id = #{user1Id} AND c.user2_id = #{user2Id}) OR (c.user1_id = #{user2Id} AND c.user2_id = #{user1Id})

SELECT c.*, u1.nickname as user1_nickname, p1.profile_image_url as user1_profile_image, u1.is_online as user1_is_online, u2.nickname as user2_nickname, p2.profile_image_url as user2_profile_image, u2.is_online as user2_is_online, lm.content as last_message_content, lm.sender_id as last_message_sender_id FROM dm_conversation c LEFT JOIN user u1 ON c.user1_id = u1.id LEFT JOIN profile p1 ON u1.id = p1.user_id LEFT JOIN user u2 ON c.user2_id = u2.id LEFT JOIN profile p2 ON u2.id = p2.user_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT dm.conversation_id, dm.content, dm.sender_id FROM direct_message dm INNER JOIN ( SELECT conversation_id, MAX(id) as max_id FROM direct_message WHERE is_deleted = false GROUP BY conversation_id ) latest ON dm.id = latest.max_id ) lm ON c.id = lm.conversation_id WHERE (c.user1_id = #{userId} AND c.user1_deleted = false) OR (c.user2_id = #{userId} AND c.user2_deleted = false) ORDER BY c.last_message_at IS NULL, c.last_message_at DESC, c.created_at DESC
SELECT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM dm_conversation WHERE id = #{id} AND (user1_id = #{userId} OR user2_id = #{userId}) )
